Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}The wind... It feels so nice...[n]

Dialog.name: MSG_000_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}I admit, I'm finally noticing the[n]beauty of spring. It's wonderful.[n]

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}And yet, without exception, each and[n]every season will come to an end.[n]

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}We fought side by side...[n]

Dialog.name: MSG_002_2_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}We faced the world's end...[n]

Dialog.name: MSG_002_4_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}And now... I'm finally beginning to understand...[n]

Dialog.name: MSG_002_6_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}...what it was I'd been searching for.[n]

Dialog.name: MSG_002_8_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}I always wondered what it really meant to "live."[n]

Dialog.name: MSG_003_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}Following your heart...[n]Fighting for what you can change...[n]

Dialog.name: MSG_003_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}And accepting the things you can't.[n]

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}Nothing on this earth lasts forever.[n]

Dialog.name: MSG_004_2_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}Every life will one day fizzle out...[n]

Dialog.name: MSG_004_4_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}That holds true for all of us. And as soon as you[n]come to terms with it, you realize something.[n]

Dialog.name: MSG_004_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}You see what really matters...[n]

Dialog.name: MSG_004_8_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}And find out what it is that gives your life meaning.[n]

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}When I learned that I wasn't strong enough...[n]

Dialog.name: MSG_005_2_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}I was tormented by it. Now I understand why.[n]

Dialog.name: MSG_005_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}Protecting others is the duty I was given...[n]

Dialog.name: MSG_005_4_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}But to me, it was more than an obligation.[n]

Dialog.name: MSG_005_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}At some point, it became something[n]I wanted to do for myself.[n]

Dialog.name: MSG_005_6_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}Once I decided to try and prevent the Fall...[n]something inside me clicked.[n]

Dialog.name: MSG_005_8_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}When I thought about how I[n]might never see you again...[n]

Dialog.name: MSG_005_9_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}That's when I first understood...[n]what mattered to me the most.[n]

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}And so, I made up my mind.[n]

Dialog.name: MSG_006_2_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}What I want... is to protect you.[n]From now, until the end of time.[n]

Dialog.name: MSG_006_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}I want to stay by your side.[n]

Dialog.name: MSG_006_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}And I know, I'm not the only one[n]out there who could do this...[n]

Dialog.name: MSG_006_6_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}But still... I want to.[n]

Dialog.name: MSG_006_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}Because I'm positive... if I do it for you...[n]

Dialog.name: MSG_006_8_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}Then nothing's a waste.[n]My life... will have meaning.[n]

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}Sorry... What's gotten into me?[n]

Dialog.name: MSG_009_2_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}It's good... I've finally found a reason to live.[n]

Dialog.name: MSG_012_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 40 0 0}I have friends... We support[n]each other through thick and thin...[n]

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 41 0 0}Not everything needs to be[n]for some greater purpose.[n]

Dialog.name: MSG_013_2_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 42 0 0}Just caring about someone can be enough.[n]

Dialog.name: MSG_013_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 43 0 0}That's all we need to give our lives meaning...[n]

Dialog.name: MSG_013_6_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 44 0 0}As for me, I've found my path.[n]

Dialog.name: MSG_013_8_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 45 0 0}And that's to protect you with my life.[n]

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 46 0 0}Thank you so much... for everything.[n]

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 47 0 0}You must be tired.[n]

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 48 0 0}Go ahead and rest now.[n]

Dialog.name: MSG_016_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 49 0 0}I'll be right here. I won't be going anywhere.[n]

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 50 0 0}In a moment, the others will be joining us...[n]

Dialog.name: MND_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I'm getting sleepier...[n]

Dialog.name: MND_018_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Your eyes feel heavy...[n]

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 52 0 0}I'm right by your side...[n]Here to protect you forevermore.[n]
